heading: Program to expand distance learning in rural underserved areas
label: 40905 Program to expand distance learning in rural underserved areas

amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40905.42 U.S.C. 16791, , .Pub. L. 109–155, title VI, § 612119 Stat. 2932Dec. 30, 2005

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Administrator shall develop or expand programs to extend science and space educational outreach to rural communities and schools through video conferencing, interpretive exhibits, teacher education, classroom presentations, and student field trips.
that utilize community-based partnerships in the field;
that build and maintain video conference and exhibit capacity;
that travel directly to rural communities and serve low-income populations; and
with a special emphasis on increasing the number of women and minorities in the science and engineering professions.
